evals.prompt: Our product descriptions need to work for both human customers and AI shopping agents. Optimize the content structure so AI agents can extract product specs, pricing, and availability programmatically.
evals.expected_output: Semantic content optimization strategy with structured data recommendations, machine-readable formatting guidelines, and examples of how to encode product information for both human and AI audiences.
expectations: Response contains machine-readable or parseable recommendation
Response references both human and machine audiences
Response does NOT focus only on traditional copywriting

evals.prompt: Restructure our API changelog so that AI-powered developer tools can automatically parse breaking changes, deprecations, and migration instructions.
evals.expected_output: Semantic changelog structure with machine-parseable formatting, consistent terminology markers, migration path encoding, and recommendations for API documentation machine-readability.
expectations: Response references changelog or versioning format
Response contains semantic markup or consistent format recommendation
Response includes intent markers for parsing breaking changes
